invocations.inputDescription: The native dialog capability plus the current trusted parent window, if one exists.
invocations.outputDescription: A native-selected path or cancellation, never renderer input.
invariants: Selection is restricted to one file and no path crosses renderer IPC.

invocations.outputDescription: A validated target/descriptor-opening artifact pair or cancellation.

errors.description: The chosen manifest or artifact failed strict admission.
